mapper.sql: select a.area_id, a.parent_id, a.ancestors, a.area_name, a.area_code, a.order_num, a.status, a.del_flag, a.create_by, a.create_time, a.update_by, a.update_time, a.remark from garden_area a
mapper.select: select a.area_id, a.parent_id, a.ancestors, a.area_name, a.area_code, a.order_num, a.status, (select area_name from garden_area where area_id = a.parent_id) parent_name, a.del_flag, a.create_by, a.create_time, a.update_by, a.update_time, a.remark from garden_area a where a.area_id = #{areaId}
select * from garden_area where find_in_set(#{areaId}, ancestors) and del_flag = '0'
select count(1) from garden_area where del_flag = '0' and parent_id = #{areaId} limit 1
select count(1) from garden_plant where del_flag = '0' and area_id = #{areaId} limit 1
select count(1) from garden_device where del_flag = '0' and area_id = #{areaId} limit 1
where a.area_name = #{areaName} and a.parent_id = #{parentId} and a.del_flag = '0' limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into garden_area( parent_id, ancestors, area_name, area_code, order_num, status, remark, create_by, create_time )values( #{parentId}, #{ancestors}, #{areaName}, #{areaCode}, #{orderNum}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, sysdate() )
mapper.update:
update garden_area set status = '0' where area_id in
#{areaId}
mapper.delete: update garden_area set del_flag = '2' where area_id = #{areaId}
